title: VonHaus BBQ Tool Set with Case, 25Pcs BBQ Accessories Kit Including Spatula, Fork, Tongs, Thermometer, Barbecue Grill Mat, Basting Brush & Cleaner, Heavy Duty Utensils for Outdoor Cooking
features: PREMIUM BBQ TOOLS: Upgrade your grilling with the VonHaus BBQ tool set, constructed from stainless steel to withstand the test of time. These barbecue accessories will add a touch of luxury to all your al fresco cooking ventures.
25PC BBQ SET: The BBQ grill set includes a 4-in-1 spatula, thermometer, fork, basting brush, tongs, skewers, corn forks, salt/pepper shakers, BBQ mats, cleaning brushes, and cleaning brush head.
ALUMINIUM CARRY CASE: Store all your BBQ accessories in the robust storage case to level up on-the-go BBQ adventures, equipped with individual holders to keep each BBQ tool secure.

BBQ GIFT SET: Looking for the perfect barbecue utensils for an outdoor cooking enthusiast? The gift box makes this BBQ utensil set the ultimate gift, for seasoned grill masters and BBQ beginners alike.

OUR BRAND PROMISE: Established in 2009, VonHaus is the ultimate one-stop shop for all things outdoor dining. Our bbq tool sets are crafted to the highest quality, with your al fresco adventures in mind.
description: Product Description Fine dining with an al fresco twist. VonHaus 25pc BBQ Tool Set with Aluminium Case & Gift Box Extend the flavours of your kitchen to the great outdoors with the VonHaus BBQ tools set. With 25 tools stored in a robust aluminium carry case , enjoy delicious outdoor feasts anywhere from your garden to the campsite. Packaged in a sleek gift box , give the gift of endless al fresco possibilities. Fine dining with an al fresco twist. Stainless Steel Barbecue Set with 4-in-1 Spatula | Premium Barbecue Tool Sets Say hello to low-maintenance, no-mess grilling with the BBQ mats and cleaning brushes . From flavouring chicken with the basting brush and digging into a corn-on-the-cob with the corn forks , to toasting marshmallows on the skewers – cook up a chargrilled feast with ease. In addition to these utensils – and many more – the 4-in-1 spatula is the ultimate tool. Use it to flip burgers, tenderise meat, and slice through tough cuts – you can even crack open a cold one with its integrated bottle opener! Previous page Comprehensive 25pc Set All you need to cook up a flame-grilled feast. Includes a range of BBQ utensils, with a basting brush, thermometer, 6pc skewer set, and more. 4-in-1 Spatula Tool One tool: endless convenience and efficiency. Featuring a serrated cutting edge, meat tenderising edge, tapered flipping edge, and bottle opener. Spare Brush Head Included Helping keep your cleaning brushes, well, clean! Remove all residue with the two grill brushes (three-sided and flat) and spare flat grill head. Aluminium Carry Case Lightweight yet robust, for ultimate protection. Secure all your stainless steel tools in the portable case, featuring a handle and buckle fastening.
